title: mgmt.site Facet
description: Demanded by the dispatch-routing engine (charter §2.3, §3 leaf-node Sites; ADR-0032): the execution locus an Entity is reachable from — the Site whose satellite agent runs Steps against it. Written by Syncers with provenance (§1.2); an Entity with no mgmt.site routes to the built-in 'local' central cluster. Unlike mgmt.channels (a per-capability co-management MAP, §2.4), this is a single PHYSICAL fact: one Entity lives at one execution locus, so the value is a scalar, not a routing map — it carries no capability precedence. site is the name of a declared Site (never 'local', which is implicit).
